title: TransactionIdentifier
description: Contains the a single or dual message transaction identifier values used for searching the respective transaction. Acquirer Reference Number, Banknet Reference Number, Trace Id and Serial Id values are captured.

acqRefNum.description: Contains Acquirer Reference Number for a transaction.

banknetRefNum.description: Contains Banknet Reference Number for a transaction.

traceId.description: Contains Trace Id  for a transaction.

serialId.description: Contains Serial Id for a transaction.
